title: Steamy American Chickpea Crumble
description: A sweet and fluffy brunch dish featuring a can of chickpeas steamed to perfection with optional additions for a savory twist.

ingredients.name: Half a Cup of Granola
ingredients.notes: Optional, use plain or add sweetened options

instructions: Place the drained and rinsed chickpeas in a steamer basket over boiling water.
Steam until tender, about 5-7 minutes. If using fruit puree, mix it into the chickpeas before steaming.
In a mixing bowl, combine the steamed chickpeas with half a cup of granola, 1/2 teaspoon of cinnamon, and a pinch of salt.
Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed. Add extra fruit puree for desired sweetness if using.
Transfer to serving plates or bowls and enjoy as is or with additional toppings like yogurt, honey, or fresh berries.
